commit.message:
fix: register service worker via SerwistProvider for iOS PWA

The service worker was built but never registered — SerwistProvider
from @serwist/next/react was missing. Also adds manifest id field
for stable iOS 16.4+ PWA identity.

fix: disable navigationPreload for iOS PWA + sync-complete event

- Disable navigationPreload in SW (broke iOS standalone mode + offline)
- Move themeColor from metadata to viewport export (Next.js warning)
- Emit sync-complete event after syncPendingMutations succeeds
- CaeTab listens for sync-complete to refresh data immediately

fix: video upload webm support + PWA standalone mode preservation

- Add "webm" to CAE_ALLOWED_TYPES (backend rejected MediaRecorder output)
- Add 5min timeout to file upload requests (was 30s global default)
- Replace hard location.href redirects with event-based auth-logout pattern
- Use router.replace instead of router.push for PWA navigation stability
- Add viewport export to root layout for iOS PWA rendering

- Stripe webhook: removed supabase client shadowing in switch cases

MEDIUM:
- UUID validation on conversations/messages and chat routes

LOW:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)
- video-record-dialog.tsx: videoBitsPerSecond 1Mbps cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline caching infrastructure — IDB schema + online status hook (Session 2)

- db.ts: IndexedDB schema with mutation-queue, offline-files, cae-cache stores
- constants.ts: cache TTL configuration
- use-online-status.ts: reactive hook for navigator.onLine state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: PWA foundation — installable app with service worker (Session 1)

Add web app manifest, Serwist service worker, install prompt banner,
and configure Next.js build pipeline for PWA generation.

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons
- sw.ts: Serwist service worker with terrain-scoped caching
- install-prompt.tsx: bottom banner with 7-day dismiss cooldown
- next.config.mjs: wrapped with @serwist/next plugin
- Dockerfile.prod: copy public assets to standalone output
- Dependencies: @serwist/next, serwist, idb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix critical gaps: wire execute_quote, true bridge cost, fuzzy chain match

- marco.py LIVE mode now actually calls lifi.execute_quote() instead of
  just recording the migration. Checks for WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY + RPC URL,
  handles TX failure gracefully.
- lifi.calc_bridge_cost now includes spread (fromAmount - toAmount) as
  cost, not just fees+gas. Prevents underestimating true bridge cost.
- Brain chain name fuzzy matching: "Arbitrum One" -> "Arbitrum" etc.
  Prevents silent migration skip when LLM outputs non-exact chain names.

commit.message:
Fix drag-to-top and flickering by using stored item positions

Capture original bounding rects at drag start and use those stable
midpoints for hit-testing instead of elementFromPoint. This eliminates
the feedback loop where margin expansion shifts items away from the
cursor causing rapid class toggling. Also fixes drag-to-top by properly
detecting when the finger/cursor is above the first item's midpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix VAD responsiveness — callers hanging up before Aria responds

- Reduce grace period from 3s to 1.5s — people say hello once, maybe twice
- Bump VAD eagerness from "low" to "medium" after greeting finishes
  so Aria detects "hello" faster instead of waiting for extended speech
- Reduce silence prompt from 15s to 8s — phone callers won't wait 15s
- Reduce silence close from 12s to 10s after prompt
- Keep "low" eagerness ONLY during initial greeting to prevent self-talk

The flow is now: greeting plays (low eagerness) → greeting done →
eagerness bumps to medium + create_response enabled → Aria responds
to first "hello" much faster.

test: full QA suite — E2E, chaos, visual regression + 10 bug fixes

Bug fixes (source):
- fix: payDebt overpayment — cap payment to remaining balance
- fix: debt not rolled back on failed transaction cloud write
- fix: bulkAddTransactions temp ID collision on same-millisecond inserts
- fix: division by zero on debt progress bar when total=0
- fix: fetchData has no try/catch — loading spinner stuck on network throw
- fix: realtime hasTemp guard blocks all other-device INSERTs
- fix: realtime payloads spread into state without validation (sanitizeTransaction)
- fix: localStorage JSON.parse crash on corrupted data (safeParse helper)
- fix: calculateStats/MoM/Category NaN on null amount or missing date
- fix: addTransaction double-submit race (isAddingTransactionRef guard)

Tests added:
- feat(test): 26 unit tests for financeCalculations (was 3)
- feat(test): E2E suites — auth, dashboard, transactions, debt, offline, security (120+ tests)
- feat(test): chaos spec — slow network, 503, corrupted data, offline→online, NaN payloads
- feat(test): visual regression — 32 tests × desktop + mobile = 64 snapshots
- feat(test): test utilities — supabaseMock, testDataFactory (unit + E2E)
- chore(config): playwright.config.ts — visual-desktop + visual-mobile projects

commit.message:
fix(release): remove registry-url that blocks OIDC auth

setup-node with registry-url creates an .npmrc expecting
NODE_AUTH_TOKEN, which overrides OIDC. OIDC handles registry
auth natively without .npmrc configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restore search_bible, topical_search, and word_study tools (#9)

search_bible and topical_search returned empty results because the
Vectorize query was missing returnMetadata: 'all', causing all match
metadata to come back undefined and every result to be silently
discarded.

word_study failed for all input formats because the morphology-to-verses
JOIN used morphology translation_id (6/7 for Hebrew/Greek source texts)
which never matches English verse rows (translation_id 1-5). Fixed by
joining to KJV (id=1) via book/chapter/verse coordinates instead.

Webinar: fix typography, stroke, blend mode to match Figma specs

- Photo blend mode: hard-light → screen (Figma uses mix-blend-screen)
- TitleClause letter-spacing: fixed -4px → -4% of clauseSz (-2.88px at 72px)
- MainTitle letter-spacing: fixed -2px → -2% of fontSize (proportional)
- Photo border stroke: formula-derived ~1px → fixed 2px
- Photo border color: ctaText → lineColor (#008c44) in all layouts
- Landscape AirOps logo: fixed 56px → 48px for n≤2 speakers (matches Figma)

feat: simple quests — 4 linear quests with coin rewards (#6)

* feat: simple quests — 4 linear quests with coin rewards

Add QuestManager (progression/QuestManager.gd) that loads a 4-quest
sequence from data/quests.json and tracks counters for trailers_placed,
trailers_upgraded, and income_earned. Completing a quest awards coins
and activates the next one; all state persists via SaveSystem.

- data/quests.json: 4 quests (place 3, earn 500 income, upgrade 2, place 6)
- QuestManager: notify_trailer_placed/upgraded/income_earned API, signals
  quest_completed and quest_activated; get/load_save_data for persistence
- IncomeManager: emit income_ticked(amount) signal after each tick
- SaveSystem: quest_manager ref; includes "quests" key in save/load
- Main.tscn: add QuestLabel below CurrencyLabel
- Main.gd: wire QuestManager before load_save(), connect all signals,
  notify on placement/upgrade, update QuestLabel via _update_quest_label()
